title: toxicodendron laevigatum
intro: Toxicodendron laevigatum, also known as smooth sumac or fragrant sumac, is a plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Toxicodendron laevigatum include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat a variety of health conditions.
